code_dossier.name: UpdateEmailResponse.java
code_dossier.description: A Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing the response structure for email update operations in the account management system. This class extends BaseResponse to inherit standard response fields like code and message.

data.detailed_description:
UpdateEmailResponse is a minimal Data Transfer Object (DTO) class designed to encapsulate the response data for email update API operations within the account management module. 

The class follows a simple inheritance pattern by extending BaseResponse, which provides common response properties including:
- ToBCodeEnum code: An enumerated status code indicating the operation result
- String message: A human-readable message describing the operation outcome

Currently, UpdateEmailResponse does not add any additional fields beyond what BaseResponse provides, functioning as a semantic wrapper that clearly indicates the response type for email update operations. This design pattern allows for future extensibility where email-specific response fields can be added without breaking existing contracts.

The class is part of the account-api module's DTO layer, serving as the contract between the account management service and its API consumers. It uses Lombok annotations (inherited from BaseResponse) to reduce boilerplate code for getters, setters, and other common methods.

Key architectural considerations:
1. The class serves as a typed response specifically for email update operations
2. It maintains consistency with other response DTOs in the system by extending BaseResponse
3. The empty class body suggests this is primarily used for type safety and semantic clarity
4. Located in the dto package following standard Java project structure conventions
responsibilities: Provide a type-safe response container specifically for email update API operations
Inherit and expose standard response fields (code, message) from BaseResponse for consistent API responses
Serve as a semantic marker distinguishing email update responses from other operation responses
Enable future extensibility for adding email-specific response fields without breaking API contracts
Maintain DTO layer consistency within the account-api module

interfaces.name: UpdateEmailResponse
interfaces.description: DTO class for email update operation responses, inheriting standard response structure from BaseResponse including code (ToBCodeEnum) and message (String) fields
